title: Creativ Bamboo Wood Cutting Board, Square, 25 cm x 14 cm, 1 pc
features: Cutting Board, L: 25 cm, W: 14 cm, 1 pc
Square cutting board / serving dish with groove and handle with 1 cm hole for suspension. Is post-treated with a natural, food-approved oil. Wash by hand for longer life
description: From the manufacturer About Us Creativity, play and learning also bring joy to the everyday – and at Creativ Company, we know the valuable feeling of disappearing into the creative, playful world, where time stands still and hectic lives are replaced by tranquillity, contemplation and imagination – and we are proud to pass this on to you. At Creativ Company, you will find approximately 20,000 products for creative play, learning and development, just as we also give you over 3500 ideas for how you can use our products and contribute towards making your world not only more fun, but also more colourful. Creative Business Creativ Company consists of more than 350 passionate people who look forward every single day to making a creative and playful difference to your life. We sell hobby and craft materials as well as toys to customers in more than 46 countries, and we have subsidiaries and sales companies in eight European countries. We are a fast-paced and ambitious innovative company. More than 20 years of play and creativity has left its mark. At Creativ Company, we don't do things the same way we've always done if it no longer makes sense to do so. Creativity lives in every corner of our business – and our focus is set continually on developing ourselves as people and employees, finding new, exciting products and developing new ideas and new ways of making our products accessible to more people. We value sustainable products highly, just as our packaging can be reused for new, creative projects. We believe that all of this creates a good, healthy and creative business.
